summary: Plan mode only. The representative #89473 is open but security-sensitive and should be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling. The other open candidate, #90139, is a non-security message-loss sanitizer bug with a different symptom and root cause, so it should remain open as independent work. Hydrated linked PRs #42119 and #87060 are already closed and require no action.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive issue involving possible internal reasoning exposure to external chat recipients is out of scope for ProjectClownfish cleanup and must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.

#90139 shares the broad thinking/reasoning sanitizer area but has the opposite user-visible failure and a different suspected root cause, so it should not be closed as a duplicate of the quarantined security report.
Already-closed linked context only; no closure or mutation is valid.
Already-closed superseded contributor PR; no closure or mutation is valid in this cluster.
